title: The Pollination
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: After human emotions are classified as a finite resource harvested from the dying, a funeral home worker begins smuggling contraband feelings back to the living and discovers the grief cartel controls more than just death.
long_description: After human emotions are classified as a finite resource harvested from the dying, a funeral home worker begins smuggling contraband feelings back to the living and discovers the grief cartel controls more than just death.
